umiyuri.description: Alternating 拍滑 with hand-coordination interlock. Tap resolves previous slide endpoint while new slide is queued. Typically appears at Lv.12+ (12.6) and above.

confirmed_songs.title: ECHO
confirmed_songs.notes: Confirmed by user. Some debate in community but user says yes.

confirmed_songs.title: 妄想感傷代償連盟
confirmed_songs.notes: RE:MASTER ONLY. Master has NO umiyuri. On-beat variant.

confirmed_songs.title: Never Give Up!
confirmed_songs.notes: DX Re:Master confirmed. Master also detected (3.2%) but Re:Master is the intended difficulty.

confirmed_songs.title: RIFFRAIN
confirmed_songs.notes: Confirmed by YouTube (Maimai Inner Project). Sections at ~2:01-2:12.

confirmed_songs.title: ベースラインやってる？笑
confirmed_songs.notes: DX Master. Confirmed by user. Detected by system.

confirmed_songs.title: KILLER B
confirmed_songs.notes: DX Master Lv.12.8. Confirmed by user. Detected by system.

confirmed_songs.title: The 90's Decision
confirmed_songs.notes: DX Master Lv.13.0. Confirmed by user. Detector shows 0% after v3 tightening — possible regression, needs investigation.

confirmed_songs.title: 不思議の国のクリスマス
confirmed_songs.notes: SD Master Lv.13.3. Umiyuri only at the END. Correctly isolated by detector.

confirmed_songs.title: Falling
confirmed_songs.notes: DX Master Lv.13.4. Confirmed by user. SD Falling Roses unknown.

confirmed_songs.title: アイドル
confirmed_songs.notes: RE:MASTER ONLY. Master has none. Confirmed by user.

confirmed_songs.title: Fragrance
confirmed_songs.notes: Re:Master only (towards end). Master has none. Confirmed by user.

confirmed_non_umiyuri.title: Freak Out Hr.
confirmed_non_umiyuri.notes: Pure 拍滑, not Umiyuri. Each-based tap+slide without endpoint interlock.

confirmed_non_umiyuri.title: Future
confirmed_non_umiyuri.notes: 拍滑 practice chart. Prerequisite for Umiyuri but different pattern.

confirmed_non_umiyuri.title: Fragrance
confirmed_non_umiyuri.notes: Master difficulty — 0% Umiyuri. Confirmed by user.
